home.title: Six Second Scribbles
home.subtitle: Multiplayer Drawing Party Game
home.step1: Each player gets a category with {count} items to draw
home.step2: Draw as many as you can in {time} seconds
home.step4: Both drawer and guesser earn points for correct matches!
home.footerText: A multiplayer web version of {original} by Gamely Games · Inspired by {inspiration} · {source}
